    dim_station.type_of_water_body AS water_body_type,
    MAX(fact_thermal.max_temperature_c) AS max_temp
FROM 
    fact_thermal
JOIN dim_station ON fact_thermal.station_id = dim_station.station_id
WHERE 
    fact_thermal.year = 2023
GROUP BY 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body
HAVING 
    MAX(fact_thermal.max_temperature_c) > (
        SELECT AVG(fact_thermal.max_temperature_c)
        FROM fact_thermal
        WHERE fact_thermal.year = 2023
    )
ORDER BY 
    max_temp DESC;

gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATION_NAME, T2.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY, T1.STATE FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATION AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Assam' GROUP BY T2.STATION_NAME, T2.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY, T1.STATE ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC;

question: प्रत्येक राज्य आणि जलस्रोत प्रकारासाठी, राज्याचे नाव, जलस्रोताचा प्रकार, आणि स्टेशन नावांची संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, विशेषतः 'LAKE' किंवा 'TANK' म्हणून वर्गीकृत जलस्रोतांसाठी, जेथे संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे, राज्यानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार आणि नंतर जलस्रोत प्रकारानुसार क्रमबद्ध केलेले.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE, T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY, COUNT(T1.STATION_NAME) FROM DIM_STATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY = 'LAKE' OR T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY = 'TANK' GROUP BY T2.STATE, T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY HAVING COUNT(T1.STATION_NAME) > 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE ASC, T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dim_state.state AS state_name,
    dim_station.type_of_water_body AS water_type,
    COUNT(*) AS station_count
FROM 
    dim_station
JOIN 
    dim_state ON dim_station.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body IN ('LAKE', 'TANK')
GROUP BY 
    dim_state.state, 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    dim_state.state, 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dim_state.state AS state_name,
    dim_station.type_of_water_body AS water_type,
    COUNT(*) AS station_count
FROM 
    dim_station
JOIN 
    dim_state ON dim_station.state_id = dim_state.state_id
WHERE 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body IN ('LAKE', 'TANK')
GROUP BY 
    dim_state.state, 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY 
    dim_state.state, 
    dim_station.type_of_water_body;

question: २०१९ मध्ये १० पेक्षा जास्त कमाल नायट्रेट एन मिग्रा प्रति लिटर मूल्य नोंदवलेले आणि २०२३ मध्येही १० पेक्षा जास्त कमाल नायट्रेट एन मिग्रा प्रति लिटर मूल्य नोंदवलेले स्टेशनचे नाव सूचीबद्ध करा.

predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.STATION_NAME
FROM FACT_NUTRIENTS n1
JOIN FACT_NUTRIENTS n2 ON n1.STATION_ID = n2.STATION_ID
JOIN DIM_STATION s ON n1.STATION_ID = s.STATION_ID
WHERE n1.YEAR = 2019
AND n2.YEAR = 2023
AND n1.MAX_NITRATE_N_MG_PER_L > 10
AND n2.MAX_NITRATE_N_MG_PER_L > 10;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT s.STATION_NAME
FROM FACT_NUTRIENTS n1
JOIN FACT_NUTRIENTS n2 ON n1.STATION_ID = n2.STATION_ID
JOIN DIM_STATION s ON n1.STATION_ID = s.STATION_ID
WHERE n1.YEAR = 2019
AND n2.YEAR = 2023
